Bride & Blossom is a luxury NYC and Naples wedding florist designing custom floral decor exclusively for weddings. Their boutique-style service begins with a complimentary consultation, focusing on each bride's vision to create custom wedding flowers. They serve New York City, Long Island, Westchester, NJ, CT, and Naples, FL.
